# uptimekuma_notification_spugpush (Resource)

SpugPush notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_spugpush" "example" {
  name         = "SpugPush Notifications"
  template_key = "your-template-key"
  is_active    = true
  is_default   = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `template_key` (String, Sensitive) SpugPush template key

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
